title: Budgets for API keys on AI Gateway
summary: AI costs are getting harder to forecast. As teams lean more on coding agents and other token-heavy workflows, a key can burn cost faster than anyone notices: Autonomous workflows that can loop or fan out without supervision Demos and prototypes that could catch unexpected traffic if shared or shipped Developers exploring or experimenting without a sense of per-model cost Set a spend cap on any key, and AI Gateway rejects further requests on that key once the limit is exceeded
author: Vercel AI

title: Opus 4.8 on AI Gateway
summary: Claude Opus 4.8 is now available on Vercel AI Gateway . Claude Opus 4.8 is built for long-horizon agentic execution and handles complex, multi-step coding tasks like refactors that previously required human correction mid-task. The model also produces clearer, less hedgy prose for knowledge work like drafting documents, analyzing data, and building presentations. To use Opus 4.8, set model to anthropic/claude-opus-4.8 in the AI SDK . AI Gateway provides a unified API for call
author: Vercel AI
